title: Add Item to FAVORITES
excerpt: It would be extremely helpful to be able to favorite an item,  subitem, and task. I spend so much time looking for specific items. Why can’t we “favorite” anything we want? It truly would be the ultimate way for us to cu…

posts.author: jenifer01 (Jenifer Mccormick)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be extremely helpful to be able to favorite an item, subitem, and task. I spend so much time looking for specific items. Why can’t we “favorite” anything we want? It truly would be the ultimate way for us to customize for our specific needs.
